issue.author: msebor

comments.author: efriedma-quic
msebor
comments.body: Yes, I think that should work.

issue.title: difference due to atoi folding on Darwin

tests.test_body:
@ws_im123 = external constant [11 x i8]
@ws_ip234 = external constant [11 x i8]
@i0 = external constant [3 x i8]
@i9 = external constant [3 x i8]
@ia = external constant [3 x i8]
@i19azAZ = external constant [7 x i8]
@i32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@mo32min = external constant [15 x i8]
@mx32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@i32max = external constant [12 x i8]
@x32max = external constant [12 x i8]

declare i32 @strtol(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @fold_strtol(ptr %ps) {
  %pwsm123 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_im123, i32 0, i32 0
  %im123 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %pwsm123, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i32 %im123, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %pwsp234 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_ip234, i32 0, i32 0
  %ip234 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %pwsp234, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i32 %ip234, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psi0 = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @i0, i32 0, i32 0
  %i0 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi0, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i32 %i0, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %psi9 = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @i9, i32 0, i32 0
  %i9 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi9, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i32 %i9, ptr %ps3, align 4
  %psia = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @ia, i32 0, i32 0
  %ia = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psia, ptr null, i32 16)
  %ps4 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 4
  store i32 %ia, ptr %ps4, align 4
  %psi19azAZ = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @i19azAZ, i32 0, i32 0
  %i19azAZ = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi19azAZ, ptr null, i32 36)
  %ps5 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 5
  store i32 %i19azAZ, ptr %ps5, align 4
  %psmin = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @i32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %min = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmin, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps6 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 6
  store i32 %min, ptr %ps6, align 4
  %psmo32min = getelementptr [15 x i8], ptr @mo32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %mo32min = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmo32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps7 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 7
  store i32 %mo32min, ptr %ps7, align 4
  %psmx32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @mx32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %mx32min_0 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmx32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps8 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 8
  store i32 %mx32min_0, ptr %ps8, align 4
  %mx32min_16 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmx32min, ptr null, i32 16)
  %ps9 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 9
  store i32 %mx32min_16, ptr %ps9, align 4
  %psmax = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @i32max, i32 0, i32 0
  %max = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmax, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps10 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 10
  store i32 %max, ptr %ps10, align 4
  %psxmax = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @x32max, i32 0, i32 0
  %xmax = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psxmax, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps11 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 11
  store i32 %xmax, ptr %ps11, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws = external constant [7 x i8]
@wsplus = external constant [3 x i8]
@i0 = external constant [3 x i8]
@i8 = external constant [3 x i8]
@ia = external constant [3 x i8]
@x0x = external constant [3 x i8]
@wsplusws0 = external constant [5 x i8]
@i19azAZ = external constant [7 x i8]
@i32min_m1 = external constant [13 x i8]
@o32min = external constant [15 x i8]
@x32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@i32max_p1 = external constant [12 x i8]

declare i32 @strtol(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @call_strtol(ptr %ps) {
  %psminm1 = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @i32min_m1, i32 0, i32 0
  %minm1 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psminm1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i32 %minm1, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %psmaxp1 = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @i32max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %maxp1 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psmaxp1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i32 %maxp1, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psplus = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @wsplus, i32 0, i32 0
  %iplus = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psplus, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i32 %iplus, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %psia = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @ia, i32 0, i32 0
  %ia = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psia, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i32 %ia, ptr %ps3, align 4
  %psi8 = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @i8, i32 0, i32 0
  %i8 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi8, ptr null, i32 8)
  %ps4 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 4
  store i32 %i8, ptr %ps4, align 4
  %psx0x = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @x0x, i32 0, i32 0
  %i0x = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psx0x, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps5 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 5
  store i32 %i0x, ptr %ps5, align 4
  %pwspws0 = getelementptr [5 x i8], ptr @wsplusws0, i32 0, i32 0
  %iwspws0 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %pwspws0, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps6 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 6
  store i32 %iwspws0, ptr %ps6, align 4
  %psi19azAZ = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @i19azAZ, i32 0, i32 0
  %i19azAZ = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi19azAZ, ptr null, i32 35)
  %ps7 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 7
  store i32 %i19azAZ, ptr %ps7, align 4
  %pso32min = getelementptr [15 x i8], ptr @o32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %o32min = call i32 @strtol(ptr %pso32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps8 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 8
  store i32 %o32min, ptr %ps8, align 4
  %psx32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @x32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %x32min = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psx32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps9 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 9
  store i32 %x32min, ptr %ps9, align 4
  %x32min_10 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psx32min, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps10 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 10
  store i32 %x32min_10, ptr %ps10, align 4
  %psws = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 0
  %nws = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psws, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps11 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 11
  store i32 %nws, ptr %ps11, align 4
  %pswsp6 = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 6
  %nwsp6 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %pswsp6, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps12 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 12
  store i32 %nwsp6, ptr %ps12, align 4
  %psi0 = getelementptr [3 x i8], ptr @i0, i32 0, i32 0
  %i0b1 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi0, ptr null, i32 1)
  %ps13 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 13
  store i32 %i0b1, ptr %ps13, align 4
  %i0b256 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %psi0, ptr null, i32 256)
  %ps14 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 14
  store i32 %i0b256, ptr %ps14, align 4
  ret void
}

@i_1_2_3_ = external constant [9 x i8]

declare i32 @strtol(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @call_strtol_trailing_space(ptr %ps) {
  %p1 = getelementptr [9 x i8], ptr @i_1_2_3_, i32 0, i32 0
  %n1 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %p1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i32 %n1, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %p2 = getelementptr [9 x i8], ptr @i_1_2_3_, i32 0, i32 2
  %n2 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %p2, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i32 %n2, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %p3 = getelementptr [9 x i8], ptr @i_1_2_3_, i32 0, i32 4
  %n3 = call i32 @strtol(ptr %p3, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i32 %n3, ptr %ps3, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws = external constant [7 x i8]
@i64min_m1 = external constant [22 x i8]
@i64max_p1 = external constant [21 x i8]

declare i64 @strtoll(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @call_strtoll(ptr %ps) {
  %psminm1 = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @i64min_m1, i32 0, i32 0
  %minm1 = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %psminm1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i64 %minm1, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %psmaxp1 = getelementptr [21 x i8], ptr @i64max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %maxp1 = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %psmaxp1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i64 %maxp1, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psws = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 0
  %nws = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %psws, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i64 %nws, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %pswsp6 = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 6
  %nwsp6 = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %pswsp6, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i64 %nwsp6, ptr %ps3, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws_im123 = external constant [11 x i8]
@ws_ip234 = external constant [11 x i8]
@i64min = external constant [22 x i8]
@i64max = external constant [21 x i8]

declare i64 @strtoll(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @fold_strtoll(ptr %ps) {
  %pwsm123 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_im123, i32 0, i32 0
  %im123 = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %pwsm123, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i64 %im123, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %pwsp234 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_ip234, i32 0, i32 0
  %ip234 = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %pwsp234, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i64 %ip234, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psmin = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @i64min, i32 0, i32 0
  %min = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %psmin, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i64 %min, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %psmax = getelementptr [21 x i8], ptr @i64max, i32 0, i32 0
  %max = call i64 @strtoll(ptr %psmax, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i64 %max, ptr %ps3, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws_im123 = external constant [11 x i8]
@ws_ip234 = external constant [11 x i8]
@i32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@o32min = external constant [15 x i8]
@x32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@i64min = external constant [22 x i8]
@i64min_m1 = external constant [22 x i8]
@i64max = external constant [21 x i8]
@i64max_p1 = external constant [21 x i8]
@ui64max = external constant [22 x i8]
@x64max = external constant [20 x i8]

declare i64 @strtoull(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @fold_strtoull(ptr %ps) {
  %pwsm123 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_im123, i32 0, i32 0
  %im123 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %pwsm123, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i64 %im123, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %pwsp234 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_ip234, i32 0, i32 0
  %ip234 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %pwsp234, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i64 %ip234, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psi64minm1 = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @i64min_m1, i32 0, i32 0
  %i64min32m1 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psi64minm1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i64 %i64min32m1, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %psi32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @i32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %i32min = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psi32min, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i64 %i32min, ptr %ps3, align 4
  %pso32min = getelementptr [15 x i8], ptr @o32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %o32min = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %pso32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps4 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 4
  store i64 %o32min, ptr %ps4, align 4
  %psx32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @x32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %x32min = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psx32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps5 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 5
  store i64 %x32min, ptr %ps5, align 4
  %psi64min = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @i64min, i32 0, i32 0
  %i64min = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psi64min, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps6 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 6
  store i64 %i64min, ptr %ps6, align 4
  %psi64max = getelementptr [21 x i8], ptr @i64max, i32 0, i32 0
  %i64max = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psi64max, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps7 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 7
  store i64 %i64max, ptr %ps7, align 4
  %psmax32p1 = getelementptr [21 x i8], ptr @i64max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %i64max32p1 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psmax32p1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps8 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 8
  store i64 %i64max32p1, ptr %ps8, align 4
  %psmax = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @ui64max, i32 0, i32 0
  %ui64max = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psmax, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps9 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 9
  store i64 %ui64max, ptr %ps9, align 4
  %psxmax = getelementptr [20 x i8], ptr @x64max, i32 0, i32 0
  %x64max = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psxmax, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps10 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 10
  store i64 %x64max, ptr %ps10, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws = external constant [7 x i8]
@ui32max_p1 = external constant [12 x i8]
@i64min_m1 = external constant [22 x i8]

declare i32 @strtoul(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @call_strtoul(ptr %ps) {
  %psminm1 = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @i64min_m1, i32 0, i32 0
  %minm1 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psminm1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i32 %minm1, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %psui32maxp1 = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @ui32max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %maxp1 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psui32maxp1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i32 %maxp1, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psws = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 0
  %nws = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psws, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i32 %nws, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %pswsp6 = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 6
  %nwsp6 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %pswsp6, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i32 %nwsp6, ptr %ps3, align 4

}

@ws_im123 = external constant [11 x i8]
@ws_ip234 = external constant [11 x i8]
@i32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@i32min_m1 = external constant [13 x i8]
@o32min = external constant [15 x i8]
@mo32min = external constant [15 x i8]
@x32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@mx32min = external constant [13 x i8]
@i32max = external constant [12 x i8]
@i32max_p1 = external constant [12 x i8]
@mX01 = external constant [6 x i8]
@ui32max = external constant [12 x i8]

declare i32 @strtoul(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @fold_strtoul(ptr %ps) {
  %pwsm123 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_im123, i32 0, i32 0
  %im123 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %pwsm123, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps0 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i32 %im123, ptr %ps0, align 4
  %pwsp234 = getelementptr [11 x i8], ptr @ws_ip234, i32 0, i32 0
  %ip234 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %pwsp234, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i32 %ip234, ptr %ps1, align 4
  %psi32minm1 = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @i32min_m1, i32 0, i32 0
  %i32min32m1 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psi32minm1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps2 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 2
  store i32 %i32min32m1, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %psi32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @i32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %i32min = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psi32min, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i32 %i32min, ptr %ps3, align 4
  %pso32min = getelementptr [15 x i8], ptr @o32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %o32min = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %pso32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps4 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 4
  store i32 %o32min, ptr %ps4, align 4
  %psmo32min = getelementptr [15 x i8], ptr @mo32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %mo32min = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psmo32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps5 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 5
  store i32 %mo32min, ptr %ps5, align 4
  %psx32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @x32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %x32min = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psx32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps6 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 6
  store i32 %x32min, ptr %ps6, align 4
  %psmx32min = getelementptr [13 x i8], ptr @mx32min, i32 0, i32 0
  %mx32min = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psmx32min, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps7 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 7
  store i32 %x32min, ptr %ps7, align 4
  %psi32max = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @i32max, i32 0, i32 0
  %i32max = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psi32max, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps8 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 8
  store i32 %i32max, ptr %ps8, align 4
  %psmX01 = getelementptr [6 x i8], ptr @mX01, i32 0, i32 0
  %mX01 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psmX01, ptr null, i32 0)
  %ps9 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 9
  store i32 %mX01, ptr %ps9, align 4
  %psmax32p1 = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @i32max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %i32max32p1 = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psmax32p1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps10 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 10
  store i32 %i32max32p1, ptr %ps10, align 4
  %psmax = getelementptr [12 x i8], ptr @ui32max, i32 0, i32 0
  %ui32max = call i32 @strtoul(ptr %psmax, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps11 = getelementptr i32, ptr %ps, i32 11
  store i32 %ui32max, ptr %ps11, align 4
  ret void
}

@ws = external constant [7 x i8]
@ui64max_p1 = external constant [22 x i8]

declare i64 @strtoull(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @call_strtoull(ptr %ps) {
  %psui64maxp1 = getelementptr [22 x i8], ptr @ui64max_p1, i32 0, i32 0
  %maxp1 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %psui64maxp1, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps1 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 1

  store i64 %nws, ptr %ps2, align 4
  %pswsp6 = getelementptr [7 x i8], ptr @ws, i32 0, i32 6
  %nwsp6 = call i64 @strtoull(ptr %pswsp6, ptr null, i32 10)
  %ps3 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 3
  store i64 %nwsp6, ptr %ps3, align 4

@a5 = external constant [5 x i8]

declare i64 @atol(ptr)

declare i64 @atoll(ptr)

declare i64 @strtol(ptr, ptr, i32)

declare i64 @strtoll(ptr, ptr, i32)

declare i64 @strtoul(ptr, ptr, i32)

define void @fold_atol_strtol_past_end(ptr %ps) {
  %pa5 = getelementptr [5 x i8], ptr @a5, i32 0, i32 5
  %i0 = call i64 @atol(ptr %pa5)
  %p0 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 0
  store i64 %i0, ptr %p0, align 4
  %i1 = call i64 @atoll(ptr %pa5)
  %p1 = getelementptr i64, ptr %ps, i32 1
  store i64 %i1, ptr %p1, align 4
